name: fitness-buddy
description: Problem Statement 13: An autonomous Agentic AI health coach built on IBM Cloud using watsonx Orchestrate structural pipelines to recommend home workouts, provide motivational tips, and suggest healthy meal options.

IBM_CLOUD_API_KEY.description: The secret IAM API key to access your IBM Cloud instance resource pool.

WATSONX_PROJECT_ID.description: The unique GUID project workspace identifier from your watsonx.ai dashboard.
